summary: The UI TypeScript compilation step failed: the TypeScript compiler (pnpm tsc) exited with a non-zero status while checking the UI sources.
root_cause: The TypeScript compiler (invoked via pnpm tsc) returned a non-zero exit status (2) when compiling the UI TypeScript project, causing the 'Compile / format / lint UI' step to fail.

evidence.reason: Shows the UI compile/format/lint step failed.

evidence.quote: subprocess.CalledProcessError: Command '['pnpm', 'tsc', '--p', '/home/runner/work/airflow/airflow/airflow-core/src/airflow/ui/tmpkhdkxx97.json']' returned non-zero exit status 2.
evidence.reason: Direct error message indicating the pnpm tsc command failed with a non-zero exit code.
Indicates where the TypeScript compilation was executed (the UI package directory).
Shows the TypeScript compiler was run over the listed UI TypeScript files (the compilation target).

suggested_fix: Run the same TypeScript compilation command locally to see the compiler diagnostics and fix the reported errors: pnpm tsc --p /home/runner/work/airflow/airflow/airflow-core/src/airflow/ui/tmpkhdkxx97.json. Address the TypeScript errors in the UI sources (or adjust tsconfig/source files) and re-run the CI checks.
